signals.headline: Trump's Partial Blockade of Strait of Hormuz Underway After Iran Peace Talks Breakdown | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump's Partial Blockade of Strait of Hormuz Underway After Iran Peace Talks Breakdown | NO | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump has initiated a blockade of Iranian ports and a partial blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following the collapse of weekend peace talks with Iran, escalating tensions amid his public criticism of Pope Leo's anti-war stance.[1]

signals.headline: US and Iran Weigh Negotiations to Extend Two-Week Ceasefire Before April 21 Expiration Amid Trump's Naval Blockade | YES
signals.raw:
US and Iran Weigh Negotiations to Extend Two-Week Ceasefire Before April 21 Expiration Amid Trump's Naval Blockade | YES | MED confidence**[1]

Reports confirm the US and Iran are considering fresh talks for a larger ceasefire deal, as the current two-week truce nears its end around April 21, while Trump advances a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz to pressure Tehran's oil exports.[1] Sources
